name: Private Fairway Parma
about: Private Fairway Parma is an indoor golf training facility that provides members with 24-hour access to private TrackMan simulator studios. The venue uses TrackMan technology to capture comprehensive club and ball data for every swing, helping golfers lower their official handicap by 6-10 strokes. Memberships are limited to 35 per location to ensure good access to tee times, with options including unlimited monthly memberships and punch passes with 10 or 20 sessions. The facility offers a self-service model where members book times through a mobile app and receive orientation on how to use the TrackMan system and software.
why_golfers_like_it: 24-hour access to private simulator studios with no booking restrictions for members
TrackMan technology provides detailed club and ball data for game improvement
Limited membership ensures good access to tee times even during peak seasons

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor used in private studios

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to bring your own clubs as the facility does not provide club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drinks are mentioned as being available or allowed at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The facility offers sessions of 50 minutes each, with up to three consecutive tee times possible for a total of 2 hours and 50 minutes.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the facility does not mention any kid-friendly amenities or services, and it appears focused on serious golf practice.
